name: revit_import_stl
description: Imports an STL file into a Generic Model DirectShape element using TessellatedShapeBuilder and the QuantumConcepts STL reader.

file_path.description: Path to the STL file (OpenFileDialog when omitted)

binary.description: When true, read binary STL; when false, read ASCII STL (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

target.description: TessellatedShapeBuilder target mode (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

graphics_style.description: Optional graphics style for imported mesh (defaults to current StlImportProperties setting)

notes: Requires OpenFileDialog for STL path; import options are shared with the property setter commands in this sample.
